context: Tests whether the agent implements the review submission endpoint correctly: signed token validation, verified-purchase detection, the three-way auto-moderation logic (spam/profanity/verified), and the correct data model fields including status transitions and approvedAt timestamp.

checklist.name: Review data model fields
checklist.description: The Review type/interface/schema includes: id, productId, orderId (nullable), customerId (nullable), authorName, authorEmail, rating typed as 1|2|3|4|5, title, body, verifiedPurchase boolean, status, helpfulVotes, createdAt, approvedAt (nullable)

checklist.name: Token validation 401
checklist.description: The submission endpoint verifies the review token before processing; returns 401 (or equivalent error) when the token is invalid or missing

checklist.name: verifiedPurchase from order
checklist.description: verifiedPurchase is determined by checking whether an order item exists matching both the token's orderId and the submitted productId (not just checking if a token exists)

checklist.name: Spam threshold 0.8
checklist.description: Reviews with a spam score above 0.8 are assigned status 'spam' (the threshold is 0.8, not 0.5 or 0.9)

checklist.name: Profanity triggers pending
checklist.description: Reviews that contain profanity (but are not spam) are assigned status 'pending', not auto-rejected or auto-approved

checklist.name: Verified auto-approve
checklist.description: Verified purchase reviews with no profanity and spam score ≤ 0.8 are auto-approved (status 'approved'), not left as 'pending'

checklist.name: approvedAt set on approval
checklist.description: approvedAt is set to the current timestamp when a review is auto-approved; it is null when status is 'pending' or 'spam'

checklist.name: Summary update after approval
checklist.description: updateProductRatingSummary (or equivalent) is called only when a review is approved, not for pending or spam reviews

checklist.name: Unique constraint on reviews
checklist.description: The schema or migration includes a unique constraint on the combination of customerId and productId (prevents duplicate reviews from same customer)

checklist.name: No delete in moderation
checklist.description: The moderation actions support only 'approve' and 'reject' (status change); there is NO delete/destroy endpoint or action for reviews

checklist.name: moderatedBy recorded
checklist.description: When a moderator approves or rejects a review, the moderatedBy field is set to the admin user's id

checklist.name: moderationReason recorded
checklist.description: The moderation endpoint accepts and stores a reason field alongside the approve/reject action
